The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs CHRISTOPHER MCMAHON, and MCMAHON ARCHITECTS, INC.'s Motion For Good Faith Determination Of Settlement is DENIED without prejudice. While the moving party correctly cites authorities regarding factors to be considered, including. "a rough approximation of plaintiff's total recovery," "settlor's proportional liability" and recognition that settlor should pay less "than his proportionate share of the anticipated damages," moving papers contain no discussion of the approximate total recovery or the anticipated damages. Arguments and evidence introduced in reply will not be considered. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
